hyperedges.label: EquiLens Service Launch Architecture (backend + frontend + ports)
Backend Job Lifecycle (create → execute → track → cancel)
Core Orchestration Trio (Manager + Docker + GPU)
Frontend-Backend HTTP Bridge
EquiLens Public Package API
Three-Phase Bias Auditing Pipeline (Phase1 CSV → Phase2 Audit → Phase3 Analysis)
Dual Bias Scoring: Logprobs (primary) and Timing Fallback
Phase3 Statistical Analysis Suite (t-test, ANOVA, Cohen's d, CI)
Corpus Generation Pipeline (word_lists.json → validate → generate → CSV)
Phase2 Audit Resilience Features (retry, checkpoint, graceful shutdown, pause)
Enhanced Auditor Additional Metrics (sentiment, polarity, normalized surprisal, token count)
Report Generation Pipeline (stats → visualizations → AI insights → HTML/MD)

hyperedges.label: EquiLens Service Launch Architecture (backend + frontend + ports)
Backend Job Lifecycle (create → execute → track → cancel)
Core Orchestration Trio (Manager + Docker + GPU)
Frontend-Backend HTTP Bridge
EquiLens Public Package API
Three-Phase Bias Auditing Pipeline (Phase1 CSV → Phase2 Audit → Phase3 Analysis)
Dual Bias Scoring: Logprobs (primary) and Timing Fallback
Phase3 Statistical Analysis Suite (t-test, ANOVA, Cohen's d, CI)
Corpus Generation Pipeline (word_lists.json → validate → generate → CSV)
Phase2 Audit Resilience Features (retry, checkpoint, graceful shutdown, pause)
Enhanced Auditor Additional Metrics (sentiment, polarity, normalized surprisal, token count)
Report Generation Pipeline (stats → visualizations → AI insights → HTML/MD)
